name: Phoenix Check Cashing
description_short: ACE Cash Express Phoenix location offers check cashing, title loans, and money services with same-day access at 2835 N 16th St. No bank account required for check cashing.
description_long: ACE Cash Express operates a physical storefront in Phoenix, Arizona at 2835 N 16th St, Ste 6, providing financial services to consumers who need quick access to cash and alternative banking solutions. The company has been serving the emergency lending market with a focus on collateral-based loans and basic financial services. Their Phoenix location offers extended hours (9 AM–8 PM Friday) and is positioned as a one-stop shop for check cashing and short-term loans. The store operates under the ACE Cash Express brand, which is a national network of similar locations. ACE's service model relies on same-day or next-day funding for loans and minimal documentation requirements for check cashing, targeting consumers without traditional bank accounts or those facing urgent cash needs. The company emphasizes accessibility and convenience, with in-store applications and immediate service availability. However, as a non-bank lender, ACE operates in the alternative finance space where cost structures can be significantly higher than traditional banking. Their business model centers on serving underbanked populations, including those with poor credit histories or insufficient banking infrastructure. The location also provides ancillary services like bill payment, money orders, and money transfers to create a comprehensive alternative financial hub. While ACE provides genuine convenience and speed, borrowers should be aware that title loans and short-term lending products typically carry substantially higher interest rates and fees than conventional loans, and collateral-based lending carries the risk of vehicle repossession.
address: 3526, 4373 S Central Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90011

company_info.headquarters: 3526, 4373 S Central Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90011

pros: Check cashing available with only valid government-issued ID—no bank account required
Extended store hours through 8 PM Friday and Saturday until 6 PM for working customers
Multiple loan products available in-store including title loans ($100–$2,500) and title registration installment loans
One-stop shop offering 10+ services: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, money orders, ATM access, tax services, and personal loans
Same-day or next-day funding available for eligible borrowers applying in-store
Title registration installment loans offer extended repayment periods compared to traditional title loans
Porte and Flare account options provide FDIC-insured banking services through partnership with Pathward, N.A.
cons: Title loans and short-term lending products typically carry high interest rates and fees (rates not disclosed on website)
Title loan collateral places borrowers at risk of vehicle repossession if unable to repay
Limited transparency on APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing on the website
Check cashing and money services involve fees that are not displayed upfront
Short-term loan products may create debt cycles for vulnerable borrowers lacking alternative credit access
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need check cashing without a bank account
Workers with irregular schedules needing extended-hours financial services
Vehicle owners with poor credit needing quick collateral-based loans
Consumers needing multiple financial services (bill pay, money orders, transfers) in one location
diagnosis: Best for unbanked consumers and vehicle owners needing emergency cash access without a bank account or traditional credit. Primary caveat: collateral-based loans and short-term lending carry substantial interest rates and fees not transparently disclosed on the website, and vehicle title loans risk repossession if payments are missed.
services: Check cashing (most check types, no bank account required)
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, credit cards)
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
